intro: Take on the challenge and become the king of kick-ups.
description:
Put your skill and precision to the test in Soccer Kick-ups. 

Tap at just the right moment to pull off the perfect kick-up! Control and guide the ball with your head, shoulders, knees and feet across multiple game modes.
Training Mode: Complete every event, improve your skills and become a pro.
Challenge Mode: Includes 3 modes: Combo, Step by Step, and Rugby. 

Post your score to the leaderboard, challenge your friends and aim to become number 1 in the world.

Features:
-Simple 4-button controls.
-Kick the ball and guide it wherever you want.
-Online leaderboards.
-A varied soundtrack for every game mode.
